summary: Complete testing of HE CARES Foundation nonprofit website - all 11 form APIs and frontend integration verified. All backend APIs (100%) working with Brevo SMTP email integration. Frontend forms tested: Contact (✓), Donate (✓), Spread the Word Story (✓), Challenge a Friend (✓). All forms successfully submit with proper success messages and reference numbers.

navigation_issues.issue: Volunteer page not accessible via dropdown menu navigation

passed_tests: Contact Form API - POST /api/contact (✓) - Reference: B390ED53
Spread the Word Story Form API - POST /api/forms/spread-the-word/story (✓)
Spread the Word Challenge Form API - POST /api/forms/spread-the-word/challenge (✓) - Reference: CHG-DD09A86364
Contact Form Frontend Integration (✓) - Success modal with details
Donate Form Frontend Integration (✓) - Payment form works
Spread the Word Story Form Frontend (✓) - 'Story Shared!' message
Spread the Word Challenge Form Frontend (✓) - 'Challenge Sent!' message
All form fields accept input correctly (✓)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown navigation to Volunteer page - 'Become a Volunteer' link not found in Join Movement dropdown menu
